channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 28.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Streeting says he resigned because Labour ‘in fight of our lives against nationalism’, and is currently losing – UK politics live
item.description: Streeting says he resigned because Labour ‘in fight of our lives against nationalism’, and is currently losing – UK politics live

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: People on here are very invested in the idea there’s something fake about Burnham’s popularity and like, will he still poll at +9 after 3 years as PM. Probably not! Will he poll better than the alternatives who *start...
item.description: People on here are very invested in the idea there’s something fake about Burnham’s popularity and like, will he still poll at +9 after 3 years as PM. Probably not! Will he poll better than the alternatives who *start...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Deputy British ambassador in Washington abruptly leaves post without explanation
item.description: Deputy British ambassador in Washington abruptly leaves post without explanation

item.title: i Politics: Tap-in, tap-out contactless travel for the North could be brought in under Burnham
item.description: Tap-in, tap-out contactless travel for the North could be brought in under Burnham

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Supermarket bosses say food price caps would be ‘preposterous’ and ‘idiotic’
item.description: Supermarket bosses say food price caps would be ‘preposterous’ and ‘idiotic’

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): UK delays some sanctions on Russian oil and gas amid Middle East conflict
item.description: UK delays some sanctions on Russian oil and gas amid Middle East conflict

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Not like Starmer has actually made many of the difficult decisions, so...
item.description: Not like Starmer has actually made many of the difficult decisions, so...

item.title: FT UK Politics: Starmer postpones fuel duty increase
The Telegraph: Andy Burnham’s Labour would beat Reform, poll finds - The Telegraph
item.description: Andy Burnham’s Labour would beat Reform, poll finds - The Telegraph

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer under fire after UK quietly eases strict sanctions on Russian oil
item.description: Starmer under fire after UK quietly eases strict sanctions on Russian oil
